params.TriggerDescription: Eerie — Whenever an enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, conjure a card named Mothlight Processionist into your hand. Discard that card at the beginning of the next end step.

params.Description: Enchantment spells you cast have convoke.
